# Birchbank Golf Course

> Birchbank Golf Course is the 18-hole course of the Rossland Trail Country Club, set along the banks of the Columbia River in Genelle, British Columbia. The club was organized on April 22, 1922. Construction of the Birchbank course began in 1962 on land leased from Cominco; the first nine holes opened in 1964 and the back nine and clubhouse opened in 1969, designed by local golf professional Roy Stone. The club purchased the property from Cominco in 2004. As of June 1, 2018, the course was reconfigured to resemble the original 1969 layout.

## Quick facts

- Street: 5500 Highway 22, Genelle, BC, Canada
- Mailing: PO Box 250, Trail, BC V1R 4L5, Canada
- Office: +1-250-693-2366 · office@birchbankgolf.com
- Pro Shop: +1-250-693-2255 · proshop@birchbankgolf.com
- Bistro: +1-250-693-5451 · bistro@birchbankgolf.com
- Course Superintendent: +1-250-693-2263 · course@birchbankgolf.com
- Season: April 1 – October 31 (average 213 days)
- Pro Shop hours: 9:00 am – 7:00 pm, 7 days a week (in season)
- Bistro hours: 12:00 pm – 5:00 pm, 7 days a week

## Staff

- Jeff Papilion — Director of Golf / Head Professional (CPGA)
- Mike DesMarias — Course Superintendent
- Brenda Hyson — Accounting

## Rates (2026 season, CAD)

- 18 holes day rate: $80
- 9 holes: $45
- Twilight after 1 pm: $55
- Twilight after 3 pm: $45
- Beat the Heat (July 1 – Aug 31, after 1 pm, not Wednesdays): $70 for 18 holes with half power cart
- Power cart (per rider, tax included): $13.50 (9) / $24 (18)
- 5-round punch pass: $340 (18) / $190 (9)
- Range season pass (members only): $255 single / $385 family

## Where to find things on the site

- /rates — green fees, cart, punch passes, range pass, lockers, promotions
- /membership — seven membership tiers with published prices
- /membership/retirees-club — Thursday morning Retirees Club schedule and contact
- /bistro — hours, contact, links to food and drink menu PDFs
- /events — events calendar and private event booking
- /events/book — booking larger groups, tournaments, dining functions
- /course — course overview and scorecard images
- /course/scorecard — full scorecard (inside + back)
- /course/history — complete club history 1922 → 2018
- /about/team — staff contacts
- /plan-your-visit — regional partners and the Kootenay Golf Trail
- /contact — all departments, addresses, emails
- /members — dashboard links (Chronogolf + Golf Canada SCG)

## Source

All facts above verified from birchbankgolf.com, April 2026.
